removed.condition: WARN(ref->parent, "BUG: direct ref found in indirect tree")

v7_1_only.condition: data_size + btrfs_item_size(leaf, slot) + sizeof(struct btrfs_item) > BTRFS_LEAF_DATA_SIZE(root->fs_info)
found_key.type != BTRFS_EXTENT_CSUM_KEY || found_key.objectid != BTRFS_EXTENT_CSUM_OBJECTID || csum_offset >= MAX_CSUM_ITEMS(fs_info, csum_size)
btrfs_root_ref_dirid(leaf, ref) != btrfs_ino(dir) || btrfs_root_ref_name_len(leaf, ref) != fname.disk_name.len
(btrfs_root_ref_dirid(leaf, ref) != dirid) || (btrfs_root_ref_name_len(leaf, ref) != name->len) || memcmp_extent_buffer(leaf, name->name, ptr, name->len)

((chunk_type & BTRFS_BLOCK_GROUP_DATA) && count_data < bctl->data.limit_min) || ((chunk_type & BTRFS_BLOCK_GROUP_METADATA) && count_meta < bctl->meta.limit_min) || ((chunk_type & BTRFS_BLOCK_GROUP_SYSTEM) && count_sys < bctl->sys.limit_min)

btrfs_auto_cleanup_diagnostic.interpretation: Most v7.1 btrfs_path candidates overlap compiler-managed __free cleanup and require scope-aware modeling before bug triage.
